name: Minestone
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
2. Add onion and celery; sauté until softened.
3. Stir in parsley, tomato paste, beef broth, water, salt, pepper, and sage.
4. Add the drained kidney beans, zucchini, green beans, and macaroni to the pan.
5. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
7. Stir in the cabbage, carrots, and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes.
8. Serve topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
